nodes.title: Gain Kynde
nodes.description: Given a character, when GainKynde(amount) is called, then CurrentKynde increases by amount (clamped to MaxKynde) and OnKyndeChanged fires with (current, max).

nodes.title: Consume Kynde
nodes.description: Given a character with CurrentKynde, when ConsumeKynde(amount) is called, then: if CurrentKynde < amount, returns false and Kynde unchanged. Otherwise deducts amount, fires OnKyndeChanged, returns true.

nodes.title: Kynde Hunger Modifier
nodes.description: Given a character with Hunger status effect, when GainKynde is called, then the amount is multiplied by the Hunger effect's KyndeGenerationModifier (1 - stacks * 0.25, min 0).

nodes.title: Kynde Age Modifier
nodes.description: Given a character with Age status effect, when GainKynde is called, then the amount is multiplied by the Age effect's KyndeGenerationModifier (1.02^tier, increases with age).

nodes.title: Kynde Scar Modifier
nodes.description: Given a character with HungerScar status effect, when GainKynde is called, then the amount is multiplied by 1.03 (HungerScar KyndeGenerationModifier).

nodes.title: Kynde Poverty Modifier
nodes.description: Given a PovertyManager exists, when GainKynde is called, then the amount is multiplied by PovertyManager.GetKyndeGenMultiplier() which decreases with higher poverty levels.
